subcodes.first_line: The Wronged One hath heard thy call and answereth thee from this exalted Station, that the remembrance of God may draw thee unto His glorious horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سمع المظلوم ندائک و اجابک من هذا المقام الرفیع لیجذبک ذکر الله الی افقه العزیز
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort
